g.text: 3D Data Quality Framework \u00b7 D2 Diagnosis Engine
Drift Classifier \u2192 Lineage Tracer \u2192 Segment Slicer \u2192 Evidence Retriever \u2192 Playbook Compiler \u2192 Prescription Router
[D2-1] Drift Classifier -- Map Anomaly to Failure Category
Classifies anomaly into a Data Failure category:
\u2022 VOLUME_DROP -- row count below expected band
\u2022 FRESHNESS_DRIFT -- data not updated on schedule
WHERE rule_id = ? AND run_date > NOW() - 7 DAYS
[D2-2] Lineage Tracer -- Identify Root Table & Impact Blast Radius
\u2022 Upstream -- find source tables that feed this table
\u2022 Downstream -- find all tables / reports / jobs
\u2022 Identifies "Patient Zero": first table in the
upstream chain that shows the same anomaly pattern.
Slices data along known dimension columns to
isolate which subset drives the anomaly.
Uses Chi-square test for categorical dimensions.
Uses Mann-Whitney U for numerical dimensions.
[D2-4] Evidence Retriever -- Gather Diagnostic Evidence for Prescription
Collects real-world evidence from 5 sources so the
Playbook Compiler can build a grounded prescription:
1. Job run logs -- stderr/stdout + error stack of the
pipeline that last wrote the table
2. DESCRIBE HISTORY -- recent Delta operations (WRITE / MERGE /
4. GitHub codebase -- transform source that produces the table
5. ITSM tickets -- prior resolved incidents, same
Each hit is relevance-scored; low-confidence sources dropped.
WHERE failure_category = ? AND table = ? AND status = RESOLVED
[D2-5] Playbook Compiler -- Build Reproducible Remediation Plan
Looks up matching playbook template in UC Volume:
\u2022 escalation_path -- who to notify per severity
\u2022 rollback_procedure -- how to reverse the fix
\u2022 evidence_required[] -- what to capture for audit
Template is GROUNDED by the evidence_bundle from D2-4
(job logs, Delta history, runbooks, code refs, prior ITSM fix).
Playbooks are versioned (JSON, stored in UC Volume).
Maintained by Data Governance + domain Tech Leads.
[D2-6] Prescription Router -- Route to D3 Deflection
Dispatch prescription to D3 Deflection Engine
Manual remediation steps guided by playbook.
D2 Diagnosis produces a fully-enriched anomaly record in DIGITAL_DATA_ANOMALIES:
evidence_bundle : job-log + Delta history + runbook + code
Evidence is persisted in diagnosis_evidence_log for audit + reuse.
